subcodes.first_line: Verily, blessed is he who hath quaffed the wine of faith and turned towards the horizon of the All-Merciful, clinging fast unto His cord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ص د ق ذکر رحمه الله من شرب رحیق الایمان و اقبل الی افق الرحمن متمسکا بحبله و
